scientific_subject: Superior-lateral view of the human brain emphasizing the frontal and temporal lobes, detailing the prefrontal cortex and superior temporal gyrus, depicted as part of an Indian anatomical research study.

visual_accuracy.textures: Glistening, moist convoluted gyri with deep sulci and visible fine arachnoid vasculature.
visual_accuracy.labeling_safe_zones: Clean white space surrounding the frontal pole and the Sylvian fissure for anatomical annotations.

negative_prompt: cartoonish, low-resolution, inaccurate anatomy, messy labels, blood-horror (unless surgical), vibrant-neon
